control_statement: VERSION3.0 MAY NATIONAL DATA CLASSIFICATION POLICY [IAP-NAT-DCLS]
implementation_task: Review and implement version 3.0 of the policy

control_statement: Any reproduction of the present document either in part or full and irrespective of the means of reproduction; shall acknowledge NCSA as the source and owner of the “National Data Classification Policy”.
implementation_task: Ensure all reproductions include NCSA acknowledgment

control_statement: Any reproduction concerning this document with intent of commercialization shall seek a written authorization from the NCSA.
implementation_task: Obtain written authorization for any commercial reproduction

control_statement: NCSA shall reserve the right to assess the functionality and applicability of all such reproductions developed for commercial intent.
implementation_task: Review and update reproduction policies annually

control_statement: The authorization from NCSA shall not be construed as an endorsement of the developed reproduction and the developer shall in no way publicize or misinterpret this in any form of media or personal / social discussions.
implementation_task: Ensure all communications and public statements align with NCSA authorization guidelines.

control_statement: Abstract Review/Approval DateVersionReviewed/ApprovedDept./RoleName May 20233.0 National Cyber Governance and Assurance Affairs Director of National Cyber Governance and Assurance Affairs Revision History DateRevision DescriptionAuthor(s)Version January 2010 PublishedictQATAR1.0 February 2014PublishedMOTC2.0 May 2023PublishedNCSA – National Cyber Governance & Assurance Affairs3.0
implementation_task: Maintain and update the review/revision history in a centralized system

control_statement: In the event, a conflict arises between this document (specific provision or clauses) and the laws of Qatar, the latter (law), shall take precedence.
implementation_task: Ensure all legal documents are reviewed for potential conflicts with local laws.

control_statement: Any such term (specific provision or clauses), to that extent shall be deemed omitted from this document, without affecting the remaining provisions of this document.
implementation_task: Review and update contracts to ensure all terms are clearly defined and applicable.

control_statement: Amendments in that case shall then be required to ensure compliance with the relevant applicable laws of the State of Qatar.
implementation_task: Review and update amendments to ensure compliance with Qatar's laws

control_statement: Therefore, the need for data management is the cornerstone that organizations must implement by having a comprehensive overview and establishing the foundations for managing data in a business environment.
implementation_task: Develop a comprehensive data management strategy and ensure it is integrated into the organization's core policies.

control_statement: It cannot be hidden that without the use of a unified system and methodology for classifying data, all organizations will have different levels of asset protection, with no defined interpretations, which may hinder the business flow especially since data is mobile in nature.
implementation_task: Implement a unified data classification system and methodology

control_statement: The National Information Assurance Standard is the complementary document to this document, which clarifies the main controls that organizations must take after they classify the data, which is updated according to the Procedures Fellowed.
implementation_task: Review and implement the National Information Assurance Standard as part of the data classification process.

control_statement: Data Classification Principles This policy is based on the following set of core principles that must be considered when classifying data: Principle 1: Understanding the nature of data Understanding data is the starting point in the methodology used to classify data.
implementation_task: Review and implement data classification principles in data management policies.

control_statement: It is important to understand data as it may have a bearing on the way it is handled, stored, secured, processed, or exchanged.
implementation_task: Ensure data classification and handling policies are in place

control_statement: Therefore, the process of classifying data must consider data lifecycle.
implementation_task: Review and update data classification policies to include lifecycle considerations.

control_statement: Therefore, risk assessment is one of the basic principles that must be considered when classifying data, which determines the sensitivity and importance of this data for the work carried out by the organization.
implementation_task: Integrate risk assessment into data classification process

control_statement: The data classification process must achieve the most appropriate classification level which is as low as possible but as high as necessary, along with the necessary level of protection without exaggeration and without adding any administrative, financial, or technical burdens that may constitute an obstacle to the conduct of business within the organization.
implementation_task: Ensure alignment with business objectives and regularly review classifications.

control_statement: A high-level governance must be established across the organization with clearly defined roles and responsibilities for the different stakeholders within the organization.
implementation_task: Establish clear roles and responsibilities for all stakeholders

control_statement: The value of the data is not fixed, as its value may change according to the stage in which it is located, which is reflected in the degree of its classification.
implementation_task: Implement a dynamic data classification system that reflects changes in data value based on its stage.

control_statement: In some stages, they are of high value and sometimes they may lose their value completely, which leads to the need to decommission data.
implementation_task: Regularly review data retention policies and decommission outdated data.

control_statement: For non-government organizations, some flexibility may be permitted in the choice of labels such as for C3 levels, “Confidential” could be used instead of “secret”, but it is necessary that the organization maintains one unified label scheme in its classification process.
implementation_task: Implement a unified label scheme for all non-government organizations.

control_statement: Administrative and technical tools that enable the use of labels must also be provided including color- coding of label.
implementation_task: Implement color-coding for labels in user interfaces and documentation.

control_statement: Sensitive Date if compromised could negatively affect operations Date for Internal Use Date that may be freely disclosed to the public Intended Audience: For your Eyes Only Intended Audience: Highly defined small set of users Intended Audience: Defined users, roles or groups based on specific business rules Intended Audience: Organization Users Intended Audience: Public Figure.
implementation_task: Implement strict access controls based on business rules

control_statement: 2: Data Classification Labels Scheme However, the protection of the associated assets shall also be considered through their rating levels (high, medium, low).
implementation_task: Implement a system that assigns security labels based on asset ratings.

control_statement: Each organization shall create its own internal Data Classification policy that is committed to following the data classification approach, in line with legislations in the State of Qatar, such as Personal Data Privacy Protection Law (Law No.13 for 2016), and Right to Access Information Law (Law No.
implementation_task: Develop and implement internal Data Classification policy in line with Qatari laws.

control_statement: The selected controls must be subject to the state of the data, as it may be either data-in-transit, data-in-use, or data-at-rest.
implementation_task: Implement encryption for data-in-transit and data-at-rest, and use access controls for data-in-use.

control_statement: All users must be aware of the tasks and duties related to data management.
implementation_task: Conduct regular training sessions on data management tasks and duties.

control_statement: Therefore, the organization must provide the required training to employees about the classification method used in the organization and follow up on compliance with it.
implementation_task: Conduct regular training sessions and follow up on employee compliance.

control_statement: The organization must provide technical solutions to facilitate the process of data classification, including data inventory, classification tools, adding tags, the method of sharing and processing it through its various stages in proportion to the required level of protection.
implementation_task: Implement automated data classification tools and ensure regular updates.

control_statement: The classification must be viewed in a balanced manner that achieves the required level of protection without overdoing it.
implementation_task: Review and adjust classification levels regularly

control_statement: These recommended classification labels shall not be used as default and it should be subject to apply the recommended data classification methodology 8.
implementation_task: Implement and adhere to the recommended data classification methodology 8.

control_statement: Data Consumer or User: is the person who deals with, uses and processes data according to the workflow entrusted to him, and he must be knowledgeable, sufficiently informed, and responsible for adhering to the optimal way to use and protect data according to the policies followed in the organization and to abide by the tasks entrusted to him during the stages of data management data and not expose it to potential risks.
implementation_task: Ensure all data consumers are trained and aware of data protection policies.

control_statement: The policy defines five (5) levels of classification shall be used for government entities in Qatar.
implementation_task: Implement and enforce the classification levels in the organization's data management policies.

control_statement: Non- government entities shall use a minimum of four (4) levels of classification.
implementation_task: Ensure all data is classified accordingly and monitor compliance

control_statement: In line with the classification levels, the organizations shall use a corresponding Data Classification Labels.
implementation_task: Implement and enforce Data Classification Labels as per organization's classification levels.

control_statement: The default classification label for unclassified date shall be C1 – Internal.
implementation_task: Set default label C1 for unclassified date in data management system.

control_statement: The data shall be secured and protected based on the security classification covering Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability.
implementation_task: Implement encryption for sensitive data

control_statement: The data classification principles defined within this policy (Section 4) shall be used as the guiding force to arrive at the appropriate classification level for the data.
implementation_task: Review and apply data classification principles consistently across the organization.

control_statement: The organizations shall manage their data throughout the data life cycle and ensure that suitable processes are implemented to facilitate the same.
implementation_task: Implement DLP tools and train employees on data handling policies

control_statement: In line with this policy, each organization shall issue its own policy mandating the Data Classification Scheme provided in this policy.
implementation_task: Develop and enforce the Data Classification Scheme policy

control_statement: The “Chief Data Officer” shall ensure that the Data Classification Program: a.
implementation_task: Assign roles and responsibilities for Data Classification Program

control_statement: The National Cyber Governance and Assurance affairs shall be the competent department for administrating this policy within the NCSA.
implementation_task: Designate NCSA as the lead department for policy administration.

control_statement: Any other deviations to this policy shall be communicated to the National Cyber Security Agency by the organization, through an official correspondence explaining the justifications and rational, along with a risk management plan identifying the risks, assessment of the risk, mitigating controls, and communication and acceptance of the risk by senior management.
implementation_task: Ensure all deviations are reported and documented as per policy

control_statement: DATA REASSESSMENT The value of data may change from time to time based on various factors such as processing cycle, time, right of use, applicability to business, etc.
implementation_task: Regularly review and update data definitions and usage policies

control_statement: Based on this reassessment, corrective action must be taken on the controls applied.
implementation_task: Review and update controls based on reassessment findings

control_statement: Once data has served its purpose, it must be decommissioned and deleted from systems to end its life cycle.
implementation_task: Implement a policy review process to determine data retention and deletion policies.

control_statement: Agencies should consult with their legal department and establish data retention policies within their organization.
implementation_task: Review and update data retention policies annually

control_statement: All legal requirements, business requirements, contractual requirements and other should be considered when determining the retention period for data.
implementation_task: Review and integrate all relevant requirements during data retention period determination.

control_statement: Legal requirements: You may have a legally binding reason to delete data from your systems.
implementation_task: Implement data deletion procedures in compliance with legal requirements.

control_statement: User requests: under data protection laws such as Qatar PDPPL and GDPR, users may request organizations to delete their personal data from their systems.
implementation_task: Implement a robust data deletion process and ensure user requests are processed securely and efficiently.

control_statement: Takedown requests: the organization may knowingly or unknowingly have illegal, unlicensed or proprietary information on their systems that may constitute a breach of the law.
implementation_task: Implement data classification and regular audits

control_statement: If such information is identified, it must be removed with immediate effect.
implementation_task: Implement automated data deletion processes

control_statement: Organizations must also consider whether it is necessary to obtain permission before releasing data and, if so, implement appropriate controls.
implementation_task: Review and implement data release approval processes

control_statement: Lastly, users must be educated about and use safe disposal methods depending on the classification of the data.
implementation_task: Provide training on safe data disposal methods.

control_statement: And although certain steps shall be implemented at the onset across the organization, when it comes to technical implementation of controls you may feel the need to break the technical implementation in defined sub scopes.
implementation_task: Define sub-scopes for better control management

control_statement: Step Step 11:: Management commitment: Management must formally introduce the data classification program in their organization.
implementation_task: Include management commitment in the organization's strategic plan

control_statement: Step Step 22: : Management must appoint a person as ‹Chief Data Officer› who has the appropriate skills and business understanding to lead and manage the program.
implementation_task: Designate a Chief Data Officer role and ensure they have the necessary skills and experience.

control_statement: Step Step 33: : Management must allocate the necessary resources (funds, staff) to the program.
implementation_task: Review and allocate budget and staffing resources for the program

control_statement: Therefore, organizations should conduct a Business Impact Analysis (BIA) to identify the critical processes/functions in the organization.
implementation_task: Conduct regular BIA to identify critical processes

control_statement: These critical processes/functions should be prioritized over other unimportant business processes.
implementation_task: Prioritize monitoring and review of critical processes

control_statement: If the Agency has an existing method for assessment of business impact, this lowercase to may be used instead of the one provided in this Appendix.
implementation_task: Review and update existing assessment methods

control_statement: The following steps should be undertaken to rate a processes criticality: 1.
implementation_task: Rate processes based on predefined criteria and document ratings.
